# Rotting Arm
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Rotting%20Arm&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Rotting Arm
| slot = sword
| tier = UT
| rarity = l
| desc = Despite its fragile and disgusting appearance, this cut-off arm packs a powerful hit.

| rof = 55
| range = 
| projSpeed = 10
| lifetime = 290
| minDmg = 175
| maxDmg = 200
| frequency = 
| shots = 5
| arcgap = 14
| fameb = 6
| feedp = 1600

| bonuses = {{Stat|hp|40}} {{Stat|def|4}}

| legendary = 3

|lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = is obtainable via minions in todd's|range2 = 2.9}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Swords]]
{{NavSwords}}
</noinclude>
